debug_info.goal:
k n : ℕ
⊢ ↑(n.choose k) ≤ ↑n ^ k / ↑k.factorial ∧ ↑n ^ k / ↑k.factorial ≤ ↑n ^ k / 2 ^ (k - 1)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
simp [hk]
    by_cases hnk : n < k
    · simp [Nat.choose_eq_zero_of_lt hnk]
    push_neg at hnk
    rw [div_le_iff (by positivity : (0 : ℚ) < k.factorial)]
    calc (n.choose k : ℚ) * k.factorial 
        = (n.choose k * k.factorial : ℕ) := by norm_cast
      _ ≤ (n ^ k : ℕ) := by exact_mod_cast Nat.choose_mul_factorial_le_pow n k
      _ = (n ^ k : ℚ) := by norm_cast
  · by_cases hk : k = 0
    · simp [hk]
    rw [div_le_div_iff (by positivity) (by positivity)]
    calc (n ^ k : ℚ) * 2 ^ (k - 1)
        = (n ^ k * 2 ^ (k - 1) : ℕ) := by norm_cast
      _ ≤ (n ^ k * k.factorial : ℕ) := by 
          gcongr
          exact Nat.two_pow_sub_one_le_factorial (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hk)
      _ = (n ^ k : ℚ) * k.factorial := by norm_cast
